parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets binary and thermometer control threshold

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic continuous code-to-voltage behavior with finite transition smoothing.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), validation logic, or simulator-specific side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: b0 and b1 contribute one and two LSB steps while each active thermometer control contributes four LSB steps.
Increasing the summed segmented code does not decrease aout.
The zero code maps to vss and the all-active 15-step code maps to vref.
Intermediate codes linearly span the vss-to-vref range.

title: Segmented DAC
